name: OSINT Web MCP
description: An open-source, local-first OSINT and Web Scraping MCP server.
author: Open Source Community

tools.name: osint_search_google
tools.description: Search Google and return structured results (title, link, snippet).

tools.name: osint_search_duckduckgo
tools.description: Search DuckDuckGo for private results.

tools.name: osint_scrape
tools.description: Deep-scrape a single URL into AI-optimized Markdown content.

tools.name: osint_whois
tools.description: Perform WHOIS domain registration lookup.

tools.name: osint_dns
tools.description: Perform DNS record lookups (A, MX, TXT, etc.).

tools.name: osint_ip_info
tools.description: Retrieve IP geolocation and network info using free API.

tools.name: osint_user_lookup
tools.description: Locate a username across GitHub, Twitter, Instagram, Reddit, and YouTube.

tools.name: osint_amazon_search
tools.description: Search for products on Amazon locally.

tools.name: osint_ebay_search
tools.description: Search for products on eBay locally.

tools.name: osint_github_search
tools.description: Search for repositories on GitHub locally.

tools.name: osint_reddit_search
tools.description: Search for public posts on Reddit locally.

tools.name: osint_linkedin_jobs_search
tools.description: Search for public job listings on LinkedIn locally.

tools.name: osint_twitter_search
tools.description: Search for public tweets on Twitter (X) locally.

tools.name: osint_google_news_search
tools.description: Search for news articles on Google News locally.

tools.name: osint_youtube_search
tools.description: Search for videos on YouTube locally.

tools.name: osint_hacker_news_search
tools.description: Search for stories on Hacker News locally.

tools.name: osint_search_wikipedia
tools.description: Search Wikipedia articles locally.

tools.name: osint_search_craigslist
tools.description: Search Craigslist locally.

tools.name: osint_search_stackoverflow
tools.description: Search StackOverflow questions locally.

tools.name: osint_search_booking
tools.description: Search Booking.com for hotels locally.

tools.name: osint_search_indeed
tools.description: Search Indeed for jobs locally.

tools.name: osint_yahoo_finance_quote
tools.description: Get current stock quote and company info from Yahoo Finance locally.

tools.name: browser_navigate
tools.description: Navigate to a URL using the local stealth browser.

tools.name: browser_snapshot
tools.description: Capture an ARIA accessibility snapshot of the current page.

tools.name: browser_click
tools.description: Click an element using its ARIA ref or semantic name.

tools.name: browser_type
tools.description: Type text into an element via ref or name.

tools.name: browser_screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of the current page.

tools.name: browser_get_text
tools.description: Retrieve the visible text content of the page.

tools.name: browser_scroll
tools.description: Scroll the current page (top or bottom).

headless.description: Run the browser in headless mode.

user_agent.description: Custom User-Agent string for the stealth browser.
